---
title: "Profiles and publication lists being collected"
description: "BioMIND is collecting short bios, profile links, publications, and headshots from affiliated faculty and students."
date: "2026-05-08"
categories: [announcement, profiles]
author: "BioMIND"
---

BioMIND is collecting **short bios, profile links, publications, and headshots** from affiliated faculty and students for inclusion in the public directory.

If you are a BioMIND member, please follow the [Content collection checklist](../../README.md) in the README to gather and submit your materials. Files can be dropped into the gitignored `_inbox/` folder of the repository, sent to the cluster coordinator, or submitted as a pull request.

We are also collecting:

- Student profiles (Ph.D., M.S., undergraduate)
- Alumni records and current positions
- Publication lists for the central `publications/publications.bib`
- Lab-specific updates

Profiles populated so far are visible on the [Faculty](../../people/faculty.qmd) page.
